Article Title: Saw more tears today than when we won IPL: Varun Chakravarthy
Article Text:
BCCI/IPL Photo

Watch Ajinkya Rahane press conference: KKR captain backs bowlers, hits back at SR critics Ajinkya Rahane press conference: KKR captain backs bowlers, hits back at SR critics

KOLKATA: The pressure was building up for Kolkata Knight Riders after six winless matches and the significance of Sunday’s victory wasn’t lost on Varun Chakravarthy.“I saw more tears in the dressing room today than after we had won the tournament (in 2024),” the spinner said. “This win has a huge significance for us.”It kept them alive in the tournament, even though the road ahead is extremely difficult.It was a significant day for Varun too, as he announced his return to form with figures of three-for 14. However, he doesn’t want to make much of it. “The wicket was helping us a little and when that happens, the bowler will tend to attack,” he said.In fact, he did not find anything wrong with his bowling in the preceding two months when he was giving away far too many runs. “It is all about the kind of wickets you get,” he said.“I’m very tough on myself. If I don’t do well, I go and pinpoint what is not there. But the pitches were such that there was nothing for the spinners. If you see other spinners also, it was the same condition for everyone. So yeah, it’s nice that there’s something for the spinners now (at the Eden).”However, he did agree that despite the slowness of the Eden Gardens wicket on Sunday, 190 was par for the course. Rajasthan Royals batting coach Vikram Rathore agreed with Varun.“We were at least 20 runs short,” Rathore, also a former India batting coach, said.He rued left-arm-seamer Nandre Burger’s missed catch off Rinku Singh when the batter was on eight, which proved to be the decisive moment, but added that it was part of the game. “Yes, it made the difference, but these things do happen.”Also Stay Updated With IPL Orange Cap Holder and Purple Cap Holder .
Article Summary: Kolkata Knight Riders beat Rajasthan Royals by eight wickets in IPL. Varun Chakravarthy took three-for 14 for Kolkata. The win kept them alive in the tournament, even though the road ahead is difficult.

Article Title: Ayush Mhatre: IPL 2026: Ayush Mhatre's injury, a blow for CSK
Article Text:
Ayush Mhatre (BCCI/IPL Photo)

Watch Mike Hussey admits CSK were outplayed after batting collapse Mike Hussey admits CSK were outplayed after batting collapse

HYDERABAD : Chennai Super Kings made a blistering start in their chase of Sunrisers Hyderabad’s 194/9 despite losing Sanju Samson in the second over, riding an explosive cameo from teenager Ayush Mhatre.Dropped before opening his account, the 18-year-old made SRH pay, smashing Praful Hinge for 24 runs in the third over and racing to 30 off 13 balls (five fours, one six) as CSK surged to 60/1 in four overs.However, Mhatre pulled up while attempting a double and was in visible discomfort after picking up a hamstring injury. His restricted movement was evident, and he fell two balls later. The setback proved decisive, swinging momentum SRH’s way as they went on to win by 10 runs.The injury, suspected to be a hamstring tear, could sideline Mhatre for weeks, compounding CSK’s woes after Khaleel Ahmed’s recent injury. Batting coach Mike Hussey termed it “a big loss,” adding that Mhatre had been “in nice touch.”Also Visit IPL Orange Cap Holder and IPL Purple Cap Holder .
Article Summary: Chennai Super Kings made a blistering start in their chase of Sunrisers Hyderabad’s 194/9 despite losing Sanju Samson in the second over. The 18-year- old made SRH pay, smashing Praful Hinge for 24 runs in the third over and racing to 30 off 13 balls (five fours, one six) as CSK surged to 60/1 in four overs. Mhatre pulled up while attempting a double and was in visible discomfort after picking up a hamstring injury.

Article Title: Mumbai Indians: IPL 2026, GT vs MI: Mumbai Indians look to break Motera jinx and get back into contention
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

Watch Mahela Jayawardene on poor bowling, combinations & team issues Mahela Jayawardene on poor bowling, combinations & team issues

AHMEDABAD: With just one win from five matches, Mumbai Indians find themselves in early must-win territory as they take on Gujarat Titans at the Narendra Modi Stadium on Monday. Rooted to the bottom of the table, MI can ill afford another slip, especially against opponents they have never beaten at this venue.The challenge is formidable. Gujarat Titans have turned Ahmedabad into a stronghold, while Mumbai’s own campaign has been marked by inconsistency — most notably with the ball. The new-ball pair of Deepak Chahar and Trent Boult has struggled for penetration, often conceding runs without breakthroughs. Even Jasprit Bumrah has looked short of his usual rhythm, leaving MI without the control they are accustomed to.Shardul Thakur leads the wicket charts for MI with six scalps, but his economy rate of 13.57 underlines the trade-off. Spin has offered control without menace. Mitchell Santner, who missed the previous match against Punjab Kings due to illness, has been economical, while Afghan off-spinner Allah Ghazanfar has picked up wickets but leaked runs.Batting has been similarly uneven. Quinton de Kock’s superb century against PBKS — after replacing the injured Rohit Sharma — was a major positive, yet MI still lacked momentum at the death.The inability of the middle and lower order to collectively finish innings has been a recurring theme they must address.Gujarat Titans, meanwhile, boast one of the strongest bowling attacks in the league. Mohammad Siraj and Kagiso Rabada form a potent new-ball pairing, supported by Prasidh Krishna and Ashok Sharma, who thrive on pace and hard lengths. Rashid Khan’s leg-spin continues to apply pressure through the middle overs.Titans’ captain Shubman Gill , despite a last-over win against Kolkata Knight Riders, admitted that he would have liked to finish the chase earlier — exposing some concern around the middle order, which has leaned heavily on Gill, B Sai Sudharsan and Jos Buttler.There is added intrigue with Hardik Pandya returning to the stadium where he led GT to their first IPL title in 2022. The noise around his move back to MI has eased, but his form with the bat remains a concern. A return to rhythm would greatly aid MI’s effort to revive their campaign. On a ground where history is stacked against them, urgency has arrived early.Also Stay Updated With IPL Orange Cap Holder and Purple Cap Holder .
Article Summary: Mumbai Indians are bottom of the IPL table with just one win from five matches. They take on Gujarat Titans at the Narendra Modi Stadium on Monday. Hardik Pandya returns to the stadium where he led GT to their first IPL title in 2022.

Article Title: Blessing Muzarabani: Blessing Muzarabani PSL ban: PCB admits ‘no contract’ but stands firm on punishment
Article Text:
Kolkata Knight Riders' Blessing Muzarabani during a practice session. (PTI Photo)

PCB defends ban despite contract admission

Watch Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling. Bombay Sport Exchange: Munaf Patel on Gautam Gambhir, Virat vs Bumrah & Indian bowling.

‘You can’t breach what you never signed’

The Pakistan Cricket Board has acknowledged that no formal contract was ever sent to Zimbabwe pacer Blessing Muzarabani for the Pakistan Super League , but has defended its decision to impose a two-year ban, insisting that a “clear verbal agreement” had been reached — a stance that has intensified the ongoing controversy.According to a report by news agency PTI, PCB sources conceded that while no signed contract existed between Muzarabani and PSL franchise Islamabad United, the player had agreed to essential terms before pulling out and joining Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2026.The PCB had earlier handed Muzarabani a two-year ban for allegedly breaching his commitment to the PSL after he opted to join KKR as a replacement signing. While admitting the absence of a formal contract, board sources maintained that the agreement was binding in principle.As per PCB sources, quoted by PTI, the offer was clear and there was unequivocal acceptance of essential terms, adding that once remuneration and structure are agreed upon — even through written correspondence — it constitutes a binding obligation.The board’s position hinges on the claim that Muzarabani disregarded this understanding in favour of a “conflicting arrangement” with the IPL, thereby breaching trust, if not a signed contract.Muzarabani’s agent, Rob Humphries, had earlier launched a strong rebuttal, calling the ban “excessive” and unjustified. Representing the pacer through World Sports Xchange, Humphries asserted that no formal contract was ever issued, making it impossible for his client to violate any agreement.“We’ve remained quiet publicly… but the situation demanded clarity,” Humphries said, revealing that discussions with Islamabad United were conditional upon securing a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from Zimbabwe Cricket.“An NOC cannot be obtained without a contract from the PSL. Despite a public announcement, no contract was ever provided,” he added, urging the PCB to “gracefully withdraw the ban” and acknowledge what he described as an administrative error.The dispute stems from Muzarabani’s decision to opt out of a PSL stint — reportedly worth around USD 40,000 — to join KKR in IPL 2026 as a replacement for Mustafizur Rahman.The PCB’s admission has added a new dimension to the controversy, raising questions about contractual processes and player obligations in franchise leagues. While the board continues to defend its disciplinary action on the basis of a verbal agreement, Muzarabani’s camp remains firm that without a signed contract, no breach occurred.
Article Summary: PCB has admitted that no formal contract was ever sent to Blessing Muzarabani for the Pakistan Super League. The board has defended its decision to impose a two-year ban, insisting that a ‘clear verbal agreement’ had been reached. The PCB’s admission has added a new dimension to the controversy, raising questions about contractual processes.

Article Title: Ipl 2026: IPL 2026: A revival of form and fortune for Varun Chakravarthy, Rinku Singh and KKR
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

Watch Ajinkya Rahane press conference: KKR captain backs bowlers, hits back at SR critics Ajinkya Rahane press conference: KKR captain backs bowlers, hits back at SR critics

KOLKATA: Kolkata Knight Riders finally snapped their winless run in the ongoing IPL, edging past Rajasthan Royals by four wickets in a tense contest at Eden Gardens on Sunday.A sharp bowling effort, led by Varun Chakravarthy’s excellent 3 for 14, and well supported by Kartik Tyagi (3 for 22) and Sunil Narine (2 for 26), laid the platform for KKR to chase down Royals’ modest 155, though not without late nerves.KKR’s batting once again flirted with collapse. Openers Tim Seifert and Ajinkya Rahane fell for ducks — Rahane’s second in as many matches — while the middle-order continued to stutter. Cameron Green briefly threatened to steady the innings before his charge was halted by a sharp stumping, leaving the hosts playing catch-up yet again.At 70 for five, and staring at another disappointment, KKR found rescue from an unlikely alliance. Rinku Singh , who survived a simple early reprieve on eight, anchored the innings with an unbeaten 53, while Anukul Roy provided the late acceleration with a gutsy 29 not out. Their unbroken 76-run stand off 37 balls turned the match on its head when KKR were clearly staring down the barrel.Earlier, on a surface offering just enough assistance, KKR would have been satisfied after restricting Royals to a below-par total. Though the visitors negotiated the Powerplay without loss, their 62 for no wicket was modest by their own lofty standards.Much of that was down to Narine’s early intervention. Introduced inside the first six overs as Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Yashasvi Jaiswal looked to break free, the Trinidadian not only checked the scoring rate but forced caution into an otherwise aggressive opening pair.Teenage sensation Sooryavanshi still emerged as Royals’ top scorer with a composed 46, an innings that stood out for its maturity more than fireworks. On a day demanding patience, the 15-year-old blended restraint with aggression, an unusual but impressive adjustment. His eventual dismissal — attempting a big heave off Varun — did little to detract from a knock that suggested growing game awareness.The day, however, belonged to Varun.It isn’t often that Varun’s celebrations grab attention, but his animated response after dismissing Royals skipper Riyan Parag, a jump, a clenched fist, a raw scream, stood out. It was his third wicket in his fourth over, and the release of emotion hinted at pressure shed after a quiet spell since the latter stages of the T20 World Cup.If Varun set it up, Kartik Tyagi finished it off. The pacer produced a decisive penultimate over, claiming three wickets in the 19th to derail any hope of a Royals late surge.For KKR, it was a muchneeded win on a difficult road, a silver lining amid an otherwise dark horizon.Brief scores: Rajasthan Royals 155 for 9 in 20 overs (Jaiswal 39, Sooryavanshi 46; Chakaravarthy 3/14, Tyagi 3/22, Narine 2/26) lost to Kolkata Knight Riders 161 for 6 in 19.4 overs (Rinku 53*; R Jadeja 2/8) by four wkts.Also Visit IPL Orange Cap Holder and Purple Cap Holder .
Article Summary: Kolkata Knight Riders beat Rajasthan Royals by four wickets in IPL. Rinku Singh unbeaten on 53, while Anukul Roy scored 29 not out. Varun Chakravarthy took 3 for 14 for KKR.

Article Title: Yesterday IPL match result: Priyansh Arya, Cooper Connolly star as Punjab Kings crush LSG by 54 runs
Article Text:
Priyansh Arya (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

PBKS defend 254 to extend dominance

Watch Shreyas Iyer masterclass & Arshdeep Singh's comeback! PBKS reveal winning formula Shreyas Iyer masterclass & Arshdeep Singh's comeback! PBKS reveal winning formula

182-run stand breaks LSG’s back

Early blow, then Arya’s counterattack

Brutal assault on Markram shifts momentum

Late fireworks take PBKS past 250

LSG’s chase falters after steady start

Pant’s effort in vain as PBKS tighten grip

Pooran falls, result never in doubt

NEW DELHI: Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly set Mullanpur on fire with a jaw-dropping six-hitting show. Blazing knocks from Arya (93 off 37 balls) and Connolly (87 off 46) - followed by a clinical bowling effort - powered Punjab Kings to a commanding 54-run win over Lucknow Super Giants in their IPL 2026 clash on Sunday. With this victory, PBKS surged to the top of the points table.At the Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium, PBKS successfully defended a season-high 254/7 by restricting LSG to 200/5. The win extended Punjab’s unbeaten run, while LSG slumped to their third consecutive defeat, dropping to eighth place.Arya and Connolly stitched together a breathtaking 182-run partnership for the second wicket, dismantling LSG’s bowling attack and powering PBKS to the highest total of the season. Arya smashed four boundaries and nine sixes, while Connolly complemented him with eight fours and seven sixes in a relentless display of modern T20 hitting.Despite losing a few wickets towards the end, the duo’s efforts ensured PBKS crossed the 250-mark with ease. For LSG, Prince Yadav stood out with figures of 2/25, while the rest of the attack leaked 226 runs in 16 overs.Opting to bowl first, Mohammed Shami gave LSG the perfect start by dismissing Prabhsimran Singh for a duck with a wobble-seam delivery.But Arya immediately counterattacked, launching Mohsin Khan for a towering six over mid-wicket.While Connolly struggled early (19 off 22 balls), Arya kept the scoreboard ticking at a furious pace, reaching his fifty in just 19 balls. Connolly soon found his rhythm, bringing up a 35-ball half-century.The duo saved their most destructive phase for Aiden Markram, hammering 32 runs in the 13th over, including five sixes. The breakthrough eventually came when Prince Yadav induced a top edge from Connolly, ending his innings at 87.Arya looked set for a century but fell seven runs short, caught at long-off by Mitchell Marsh off Manimaran Siddharth. A brief middle-order wobble followed as Shreyas Iyer and Nehal Wadhera departed in quick succession.However, the momentum stayed with PBKS as Marcus Stoinis (29 off 16) and Shashank Singh (17 off 6) provided a late flourish. Shashank smashed 20 runs off Shami’s final over to push the total beyond 250, before Stoinis was run out off the last ball.LSG’s experiment of opening with Ayush Badoni and Mitchell Marsh showed early promise, with the pair adding 61 runs. But the stand failed to provide the ideal launchpad, as Vijaykumar Vyshak broke through by deceiving Badoni with a slower delivery at the end of the powerplay.Marsh and Rishabh Pant tried to revive the chase, with Pant smashing back-to-back sixes off Marco Jansen. However, Yuzvendra Chahal applied the brakes and dismissed Marsh, tightening PBKS’ grip.Pant continued his counterattack with consecutive sixes off Chahal but fell for a quick 43, edging Arshdeep Singh behind - a decision confirmed by UltraEdge.The chase effectively ended when Nicholas Pooran fell cheaply for nine, mistiming a knuckleball from Jansen. Late resistance from Markram (42) and Mukul Choudhary (21*) - aided by a few dropped catches — only delayed the inevitable as PBKS sealed a dominant win.
Article Summary: Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly set Mullanpur on fire with a jaw-dropping six- hitting show. Blazing knocks from Arya (93 off 37 balls) and Connolly (87 off 46) powered Punjab Kings to a commanding 54-run win over Lucknow Super Giants in their IPL 2026 clash on Sunday. With this victory, PBKS surged to the top of the points table.

Article Title: Manchester City: Premier League: Man City crush Arsenal hopes, seize control of title race
Article Text:
Manchester City's Erling Haaland during the English Premier League match against Arsenal. (AP Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Liverpool edge derby thriller, Villa and Forest shine



Manchester City seized control of the Premier League title race with a crucial 2-1 victory over Arsenal on Sunday, dealing a major blow to the Gunners’ fading title ambitions.With the season entering its decisive phase, Erling Haaland proved the difference, netting the winner in the 65th minute after a tense and error-strewn contest. The result leaves Man City in pole position to reclaim the title, while Arsenal’s long wait for a league crown — stretching back to 2004 — looks set to continue.Arsenal had been frontrunners for months but are faltering at the worst possible time. The visitors briefly found hope when Kai Havertz capitalised on a rare mistake from City goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma to cancel out Rayan Cherki’s opener. But Haaland’s clinical finish restored City’s advantage and ultimately settled the contest.In a dramatic finale, Arsenal had a golden opportunity to salvage a point, only for Havertz to head over from close range, leaving manager Mikel Arteta on his knees in frustration.The win means that if City defeat Burnley in their game in hand, Pep Guardiola’s side will go top, putting them firmly on course for a seventh league title in nine seasons.Guardiola, however, urged caution. “Momentum shifts in one instant,” he said, warning that the race is far from over despite City’s advantage.Arteta admitted his side had missed a huge opportunity. “We went very close but not close enough… we have to accept we lost a big one,” he said, while insisting Arsenal still believe they can respond in the remaining games.Elsewhere, Liverpool strengthened their push for a Champions League spot with a dramatic 2-1 win over Everton, sealed by a 100th-minute header from Virgil van Dijk.Mohamed Salah had given Liverpool the lead before Everton responded through Beto, but Van Dijk’s late heroics ensured a crucial three points that moved Liverpool seven clear of sixth-placed Chelsea.Aston Villa also stayed firmly in the top-four hunt, surviving a scare to beat Sunderland 4-3, with Tammy Abraham scoring a stoppage-time winner after Ollie Watkins had struck twice.At the other end, Nottingham Forest boosted their survival hopes as Morgan Gibbs-White scored a hat-trick in a 4-1 comeback win over Burnley, piling pressure on struggling Tottenham.
Article Summary: Erling Haaland scores winner as Manchester City beat Arsenal 2-1. Result leaves City in pole position to reclaim the Premier League title. Arsenal's long wait for a league crown — stretching back to 2004 — looks set to continue. Liverpool strengthen push for Champions League spot with dramatic win over Everton. Nottingham Forest boost survival hopes with 4-1 comeback win over Burnley.

Article Title: ISL clubs seek structured talks with AIFF, propose owners’ committee
Article Text:
ISL seek role to find AIFF’s rights partner (Screengrab)

Watch Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game

PANAJI: Indian Super League (ISL) club owners have proposed the formation of a club working committee involving the owners and decision makers, who would then engage with the federation in a “structured and transparent” manner to find the best taker for its long-term commercial rights.In a letter signed by 13 of the 14 owners, except Inter Kashi, the clubs said the group wanted to provide an appropriate platform through which ideas can be exchanged, common ground can be identified, and a balanced, sustainable, and mutually beneficial framework can be developed together.The clubs proposed three owners, Bhavesh Jindal/ Dhruv Sood (SC Delhi), Nikhil Nimmagadda (Kerala Blasters) and Rohan Sharma (Odisha FC), in the committee, while other representatives include Ravi Puskur (CEO, FC Goa), Ekansh Gupta (VP, Chennaiyin), Darren Caldeira (CEO, Bengaluru) and Vinay Chopra (director, Mohun Bagan SG).The club owners’ letter to AIFF president Kalyan Chaubey comes two days after the federation formed the ISL Governing Council and asked remaining six clubs to submit the name of their representative latest by Friday. The AIFF’s response, interestingly, came after an online meeting of all club owners just a day earlier.The club owners had little choice but join hands since the AIFF appears keen to accept the bid from Genius Sports and hand the London-based company the commercial rights of the ISL for 15+5 years. Genius’ Rs 64.4 crore annual bid, or approx. Rs 2,130 crore over 20 years with a five percent increment per year, needs an approval from the general body.The clubs aren’t happy with the rights procees and believe it’s important to engage with all stakeholders.
Article Summary: Indian Super League (ISL) club owners have proposed the formation of a club working committee involving the owners and decision makers. The committee would then engage with the federation in a ‘structured and transparent’ manner to find the best taker for its long-term commercial rights. 13 of the 14 owners, except Inter Kashi, said the group wanted to provide an appropriate platform.

Article Title: Chennaiyin beat Delhi to break home jinx; Odisha split points
Article Text:
Chennaiyin beat Delhi

Watch Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game

CHENNAI: At long last, Chennaiyin FC gave their fans a reason to cheer, breaking their home jinx in the Indian Super League this season after beating Sporting Club Delhi here on Friday.Farukh Choudhary’s 11th-minute strike handed them a 1-0 win and took CFC to eight points from eight matches, same as Delhi’s. After a bright attacking start, Farukh, receiving a pass from Alberto Noguera on the left, advanced into the box and unleashed a shot with his weaker left foot. Goalkeeper Nora Fernandes could not do much and watched it sail over him into the top-right corner.Just before half-time, defender Alex Saji denied CFC a two-goal cushion. Irfan Yadwad delivered a teasing cross from the right that fell kindly for Daniel Chima Chukwu, but just as the striker pulled the trigger, Saji from inside the six-yard box slid in to block and keep the lead in check. After the break, the home side struggled to make inroads into the attacking third in the opening 10 minutes while Delhi kept creating opportunities.Odisha FC settle for draw as Md Sp earn first point: Odisha FC’s finishing woes continued to haunt them at home as well as they were held to a 1-1 draw by wooden spooners Mohammedan Sporting Club in the Indian Super League at Kalinga Stadium in Bhubaneswar on Friday, reports Sourav Modak.For the Kolkata giants though, it was a welcome result as they brought home a point, their first in this edition following seven straight losses. The hosts had taken the lead in the 40th minute through VP Suhair while T Adison Singh scored the equaliser for MSC in the 57th minute as the game ended with scores level at the final whistle.
Article Summary: Farukh Choudhary’s 11th-minute strike handed them a 1-0 win and took CFC to eight points from eight matches, same as Delhi's. Mohammedan Sporting Club held Odisha FC 1-1 at Kalinga Stadium in Bhubaneswar.

Article Title: FIFA president Infantino confirms Iran’s participation in 2026 World Cup in USA
Article Text:
Iran national football team (Reuters Photo)

FIFA president Gianni Infantino has confirmed that Iran will take part in the 2026 FIFA World Cup despite ongoing tensions in the Middle East, stressing that football must remain separate from politics.Speaking at a CNBC-hosted economic conference on Wednesday, Infantino said, "Iran is coming for sure. We hope that by then the situation will be a peaceful situation, that would definitely help,""But Iran has to come, they represent their people, they have qualified, the players want to play," he added as the team's upcoming matches scheduled in the United States in June.Iran’s participation had come under uncertainty following the conflict involving the United States and Israel earlier this year. The team had even considered a boycott and requested that their matches be moved out of the United States, a proposal FIFA ultimately rejected. The Asian side is scheduled to play its Group G matches in the United States, two in Los Angeles and one in Seattle, while being based in Tucson, Arizona during the tournament.Tensions escalated after the February 28 conflict, followed by weeks of air strikes and retaliatory actions.Although a fragile truce came into effect on April 8, geopolitical strains remain, including restrictions in the Strait of Hormuz and US-imposed maritime measures involving Iranian ports.Infantino had made similar comments in March, when he attended an Iran-Costa Rica friendly in Antalya, Turkey, even though US President Donald Trump had previously suggested that Iranian players might not be "safe" in the United States.Despite the backdrop, Infantino reiterated FIFA’s stance on keeping sport above political conflicts. “Sports should be outside of politics. "If there's nobody else that believes in building bridges and keeping them intact and together, we are doing the job," he said.The 2026 World Cup, co-hosted by the United States, Canada, and Mexico, will be the first edition to feature 48 teams and is scheduled to begin on June 11.
Article Summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino confirms Iran will take part in the 2026 World Cup. Iran's participation had come under uncertainty following the conflict involving the United States and Israel earlier this year. The Asian side is scheduled to play its Group G matches in the U.S. during the tournament.

Article Title: Atletico Madrid: Champions League: Atletico Madrid edge Barcelona 3-2 on aggregate to enter semis
Article Text:
Julian Alvarez of Atletico de Madrid takes a free kick during the UEFA Champions League 2025/26 Quarter-Final Second Leg match between Club Atlético de Madrid and FC Barcelona at Riyadh Air Metropolitano on April 14, 2026 in Madrid, Spain. (Photo/Getty Images)

Atletico Madrid knocked Barcelona out of the Champions League despite a 2-1 defeat in the second leg of their quarter-final on Tuesday, advancing 3-2 on aggregate.Barcelona took an early lead through Lamine Yamal and Ferran Torres inside the first 24 minutes. However, Ademola Lookman scored for Atletico, which proved enough after their 2-0 win in the first leg.Managed by Diego Simeone, Atletico reached the semi-finals of the competition for the first time since 2017.Barcelona’s hopes of forcing extra time were affected late in the match when defender Eric Garcia was sent off for bringing down Alexander Sorloth as he ran towards goal.Atletico, who have not won the competition and lost the finals in 2014 and 2016 under Simeone, will now face either Arsenal or Sporting Lisbon in the semi-finals.“(We're) very happy, knocking out a great Barca side. We had a great game away... it was really hard for us at the start (of this one), but the team knew how to get back on its feet,” Atletico midfielder Koke told Movistar.Barcelona last won the Champions League in 2015, and their wait for another title continues. Midfielder Frenkie de Jong said the team is improving despite the exit.“I think we had a very good game, we gave our lives out there, we tried everything,” he said.“I feel like luck was not on our side. We have to continue -- we're on a good path, we're growing every year.”Barcelona coach Hansi Flick started with Torres and Gavi in attack, leaving Marcus Rashford and Robert Lewandowski on the bench.Barcelona began strongly, with Yamal scoring in the fourth minute after pressing Clement Lenglet into an error. Torres later doubled the lead in the 24th minute after finishing a pass from Dani Olmo.Atletico responded in the 31st minute when Marcos Llorente set up Lookman to score.Barcelona thought they had a third goal in the second half through Torres, but it was ruled out for offside.Goalkeeper Joan Garcia made a save to deny Robin Le Normand, while tensions increased as Matteo Ruggieri was left bleeding after contact with Gavi.The match turned further against Barcelona when Eric Garcia was sent off late in the game. Flick responded by pushing Ronald Araujo forward, but Atletico held on through stoppage time to secure their place in the semi-finals.
Article Summary: Atletico Madrid beat Barcelona 2-1 in Champions League quarter-final. Lamine Yamal and Ferran Torres scored for Barcelona. Ademola Lookman scored for Atletico. Atletico advance 3-2 on aggregate and will face either Arsenal or Sporting Lisbon.

Article Title: Champions League: Barcelona eye Atletico comeback
Article Text:
Barcelona's Marcus Rashford, left, celebrates after scoring his side's fourth goal with Lamine Yamal, right, and Pedri during the Spanish La Liga soccer match between Barcelona and Espanyol in Barcelona, Spain, Saturday, April 11, 2026. (AP Photo)

Watch Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game

1ST LEG SCORES

Barcelona: Marcus Rashford had his chance against Atletico Madrid, but failed to take it — or any of the next five that came along on a frustrating European night.On Tuesday the England international has another opportunity to try and inspire Barcelona to a Champions League comeback in the Spanish capital.Rashford fired blanks as Barca suffered a 2-0 quarterfinal first leg defeat, but the England international was also his team’s brightest spark against the Rojiblancos, even though the killer finish eluded him. With Raphinha out injured, Rashford has been the natural choice on Barca’s left flank.Talented teenager Lamine Yamal was double and triple marked, in the first leg, to keep him under wraps. Atletico Madrid midfielder Koke said his team must play with “personality” to stop Barcelona mounting a comeback.“It’s hugely important to beat the press they usually put on,” Koke said on Monday. “They’re a team that presses very high, that pushes their line almost up to the halfway line that suffocates you.“That’s where our personality comes in, when it’s time to play, to want the ball, to make ourselves available, to make runs in behind.”Barcelona 0 vs Atletico Madrid 2 PSG 2 vs Liverpool 0
Article Summary: Rashford fired blanks as Barca suffered a 2-0 quarterfinal first leg defeat. England international was also his team’s brightest spark against the Rojiblancos. With Raphinha out injured, Rashford has been the natural choice on Barca's left flank.Talented teenager Lamine Yamal was double and triple marked, in the first leg, to keep him under wraps.

Article Title: Footballer dies after robbers attack team bus
Article Text:
Football (Representational Photo)

Watch EXCLUSIVE: Where did things go wrong for India in Women's Asia Cup? Aditi Chauhan decodes EXCLUSIVE: Where did things go wrong for India in Women's Asia Cup? Aditi Chauhan decodes

Poll Do you believe community support could help prevent such tragic incidents? Yes, community vigilance is crucial Not necessarily, crime happens everywhere

NEW DELHI: A Ghanaian Premier League footballer, Dominic Frimpong, has died after armed robbers attacked his team while they were returning from an away match on Sunday, according to the Ghana Football Association.The incident shocked the country’s football community and left his club and teammates devastated.The club, Berekum Chelsea FC, said in a statement that "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles" fired on the team bus and forced the players to take cover in the bushes.The attack reportedly happened around 10:30 pm local time along the Ahyiresu-Kwame Dwumor Sreso road in the Nyinahin District of Ghana’s Ashanti Region.During the chaos, Dominic Frimpong was hit by gunfire. Police said he was rushed to hospital but later died while receiving treatment.The violent robbery also affected others, including a 52-year-old victim. "Another victim, George Owusu Afriyie, 52, was also robbed of 4,500.00 cedis ($408)," the police said in a statement.Authorities confirmed the incident and described it as a criminal attack that led to loss of life and theft.The Ghana Football Association called the event "tragic" and a "huge loss to Berekum Chelsea but also to Ghana football as a whole."Frimpong, just 20 years old, was seen as a rising talent in Ghanaian football."Dominic was a promising young talent whose dedication and passion for the game embodied the spirit of our league," it said in a statement.He had joined Berekum Chelsea FC on loan from Aduana Stars FC earlier this year and had already played 13 matches, scoring two goals.His sudden death has left the local football community mourning a young career cut short in a violent and unexpected tragedy.
Article Summary: Ghanaian Premier League footballer, Dominic Frimpong, has died after armed robbers attacked his team. The club, Berekum Chelsea FC, said in a statement that "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles" fired on the team bus and forced the players to take cover in the bushes. Police said he was rushed to hospital but later died while receiving treatment.

Article Title: Manchester City rout Chelsea to close gap on leaders Arsenal
Article Text:
PTI Photo

- Cherki sparkles -

Manchester City ignited the Premier League title race with a second-half blitz that sealed a 3-0 win against Chelsea as they closed the gap on leaders Arsenal on Sunday. Pep Guardiola's side produced a devastating spell immediately after half-time, with Nico O'Reilly and Marc Guehi scoring in the space of six minutes at Stamford Bridge.Jeremy Doku wrapped up a statement victory to ensure City took advantage of Arsenal's shock 2-1 home defeat against Bournemouth on Saturday.Second-placed City are now only six points behind Arsenal with a game in hand, setting up a seismic showdown against the Gunners at the Etihad Stadium on April 19.Having beaten Arsenal in the League Cup final and thrashed Liverpool in the FA Cup quarter-finals, City are hitting form at just the right time.Their bid for a seventh English title under Guardiola appeared to be fading after successive draws with strugglers West Ham and Nottingham Forest in their previous two league matches.A disjointed first half against Chelsea suggested City might waste a golden opportunity to pile pressure on Arsenal.But Guardiola's half-time team-talk had the desired effect and City can now target next weekend's do-or-die visit from Mikel Arteta's spluttering team.If City win that blockbuster clash, they will be within three points of Arsenal, who blew substantial leads in the 2023 and 2024 title races, allowing Guardiola's men to pip them to the trophy.Arteta said the defeat to Bournemouth was a "punch in the face" and City's success in west London was another body blow for the Spaniard.City have won 29 of their 32 league games in the month of April in recent seasons, underlining their ability to thrive when the title pressure mounts.After winning their first four league matches following Liam Rosenior's arrival from Strasbourg to replace Enzo Maresca, Chelsea have won just one of their last seven, losing three in a row to leave the Blues boss facing some difficult questions.Chelsea, who haven't beaten City since the 2021 Champions League final, were again without Enzo Fernandez after Rosenior's controversial decision to drop the Argentine midfielder for hinting he might leave in the summer.Sixth-placed Chelsea looked subdued without Fernandez and they trail four points behind Liverpool in the race to qualify for the Champions League via a top-five finish.Lacking energy and cohesion in a sloppy start, City were fortunate not to fall behind when Marc Cucurella's clinical finish was disallowed for a tight offside.City also let Pedro Neto in far too easily for a stinging strike that forced Gianluigi Donnarumma to save at his near post.It took City 35 minutes to mount an incisive raid as Bernardo Silva stretched to meet O'Reilly's cross, but Robert Sanchez made a fine save from the midfielder's close-range effort.But City stepped up after the interval and O'Reilly made the breakthrough in the 51st minute.Rayan Cherki whipped an in-swinging cross towards O'Reilly and the City left-back reprised his League Cup final heroics with another clinical header from close range.Six minutes later, Cherki again showed the creative genius that has won over Guardiola despite some impetuous moments in his first season in Manchester.The France playmaker glided past a gaggle of Chelsea players on the edge of the area before threading a sublime pass to Guehi, who looked more like a forward than a centre-back as he smashed a perfect strike into the far corner from 12 yards.City benefitted from wretched Chelsea defending for their third goal in the 68th minute.Sanchez rolled the ball to Moises Caicedo even though the Chelsea midfielder was surrounded by three City players and Doku pounced, racing into the area to drill home as Guardiola celebrated a priceless result.
Article Summary: Manchester City beat Chelsea 3-0 at Stamford Bridge. Nico O'Reilly, Marc Guehi and Jeremy Doku on target. Second-placed City now six points behind Arsenal with a game in hand. Pep Guardiola's side face Gunners at the Etihad Stadium on April 19.

Article Title: Bournemouth stun Arsenal 2-1 at the Emirates to dent Premier League title push
Article Text:
Bournemouth's Evanilson, and Eli Junior Kroupi celebrate (AP Photo/Dave Shopland)

Arsenal’s Premier League title hopes suffered a major setback on Saturday as they were beaten 2-1 at the Emirates by Bournemouth, handing Manchester City renewed belief in the race at the top of the table.Bournemouth struck first in the 17th minute when Junior Kroupi pounced on a loose ball inside the box after a looping deflection off William Saliba fell kindly into his path, allowing him to tap home from close range and silence the home crowd.Arsenal responded and gradually grew into the game, with their pressure finally telling in the 35th minute. Viktor Gyökeres stepped up and smashed home a penalty after Ryan Christie was adjudged to have handled the ball inside the area. That goal brought Arsenal level and briefly settled nerves around the stadium.The Gunners came out stronger after the break, and Mikel Arteta reacted with bold attacking changes, introducing Eberechi Eze, 16-year-old Max Dowman and Leandro Trossard in place of Kai Havertz, Noni Madueke and Gabriel Martinelli. However, despite the fresh legs, Arsenal continued to struggle to break down Bournemouth’s disciplined defensive structure.Bournemouth, however, remained dangerous in transition and regained the lead in the 74th minute with a well-worked move. David Brooks created the opening before Evanilson’s involvement helped the ball fall to Alex Scott , who finished emphatically, drilling a powerful shot past David Raya.Arsenal threw everything forward in the closing stages but lacked precision in the final third. Gyökeres came closest late on, firing wide deep into stoppage time, as Bournemouth held firm under pressure.The hosts ended with just three shots on target and suffered only their second home league defeat of the season, a worrying sign given the timing of the run-in.Arsenal remain nine points clear at the top with six games left in their pursuit of a first Premier League title since 2004, but Manchester City, with games in hand, now have a clear opportunity to cut the gap and pile pressure on the leaders ahead of their upcoming meeting at the Etihad.
Article Summary: Bournemouth struck first in the 17th minute when Junior Kroupi pounced on a loose ball inside the box. Arsenal responded and gradually grew into the game, with their pressure finally telling in the 35th minute. Viktor Gyökeres stepped up and smashed home a penalty after Ryan Christie was adjudged to have handled the ball.

Article Title: Ollie Watkins helps Aston Villa defeat Bologna in quarter-final of Europa League
Article Text:
Aston Villa beat Bologna (Screengrab)

Aston Villa moved a step closer to the Europa League semi-finals with a hard-fought 3-1 victory over Bologna on Thursday night, in a contest that could have taken a very different turn had it not been for the clinical finishing of Ollie Watkins.Villa’s win was built on key moments at either end of the match. Ezri Konsa gave the visitors the lead just before half-time, while Watkins struck twice, once early in the second half and again deep into stoppage time, to put Unai Emery’s side firmly in control of the tie. The result leaves Villa strong favourites to progress to the last four, where they will face either FC Porto or Nottingham Forest, provided they complete the job in the second leg at Villa Park. Despite the defeat, Bologna remain in contention thanks to a late goal from Jonathan Rowe.Bologna entered the match in excellent form, having won their last seven away games in all competitions, and they began with intent. The hosts came agonisingly close to taking the lead on multiple occasions, striking the woodwork twice during a dominant first-half spell. They even thought they had gone ahead in the 26th minute when a deflection involving Konsa resulted in the ball finding the net.However, celebrations were cut short after VAR ruled that Santiago Castro had been marginally offside in the build-up.Moments later, Bologna continued to threaten, with Rowe’s energetic run down the left setting up Lewis Ferguson, whose effort crashed against the underside of the crossbar.But just as Bologna looked the more dangerous side, Villa struck a decisive blow. On the stroke of half-time, Konsa rose strongly in the box, holding off Jhon Lucumí before heading home from a corner delivered by Youri Tielemans. The goal, aided by a misjudgement from goalkeeper Federico Ravaglia, shifted the momentum firmly in Villa’s favour.Villa capitalised on that momentum early in the second half. Just five minutes after the restart, Watkins doubled the lead after Bologna defender Torbjorn Heggem carelessly gave away possession inside his own penalty area. The England striker remained composed, slotting the ball through Ravaglia’s legs to make it 2-0.Despite the setback, Bologna refused to back down. Federico Bernardeschi came close to pulling one back, striking the outside of the post as the hosts continued to press forward. Their persistence was finally rewarded in the 90th minute when Rowe produced a fine finish to give Bologna a lifeline and spark hopes of a comeback in the second leg.However, any momentum the hosts gained was quickly extinguished. Deep into stoppage time, Villa struck again from a set piece, with Watkins left completely unmarked to tap home his second goal of the night and restore the two-goal cushion.Speaking after the match, Watkins highlighted the importance of timing in Villa’s goals. “Just before half-time is a great time to score. We got the second after half-time and then felt we could always score more,” he said. “At this stage of the season, I’m raring to go. I feel like I could play another 90 minutes, I’m hungry for what’s next.”Villa’s clinical edge ultimately proved to be the difference. While Bologna created chances and showed attacking intent, their inability to convert, and costly defensive errors, allowed Emery’s experienced side to take control of the tie. With the second leg set to be played in Birmingham, Villa now have one foot in the semi-finals and are firmly on course to chase their first major trophy in three decades, as well as strengthen their push for a top-five finish in the Premier League
Article Summary: Aston Villa beat Bologna 3-1 in their Europa League quarter-final first leg. Ezri Konsa, Ollie Watkins and Jonathan Rowe scored for the visitors. Villa will now face either FC Porto or Nottingham Forest in the last four.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel And Dianna Russini: Mike Vrabel’s Coach of the Year win faces scrutiny as AP stays silent on Dianna Russini ballot controversy
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel’s Coach of the Year win faces scrutiny as AP stays silent on Dianna Russini ballot controversy(Getty Images)

Coach of the Year debate intensifies as Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel controversy raises fresh questions

Mike Vrabel’s rise with the New England Patriots should have stayed a football story. Instead, it has turned into a wider debate. Questions around Dianna Russini and her role as an AP voter have now pulled his Coach of the Year honor into the spotlight.The controversy picked up pace in April 2026. And right now, the silence from the Associated Press is only adding more heat.The situation traces back to early April 2026, when photos of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini surfaced online. The images, first published by the New York Post, showed the two together at a resort in Arizona just before the NFL owners meetings in late March.The fallout came all of a sudden. On top of that, Russini resigned from The Athletic on April 14, 2026, amid an internal review linked to the situation. She addressed it directly in her resignation letter, saying she stood by her work and pushed back on what she called speculation around the photos.That development shifted attention toward her role in AP voting. Russini held a vote for major NFL honors, including Coach of the Year. With Vrabel leading the Patriots to a Super Bowl appearance in his first season, his award looked straightforward on paper. But the timing of the controversy has raised questions about optics and possible conflicts.So far, there is no confirmed evidence of wrongdoing. That part matters. Still, the lack of clarity has kept the story alive. When Pro Football Talk sought a response from the Associated Press in mid-April 2026 regarding a possible review of Russini’s ballots, the organization declined to comment, as reported by Sportskeeda.This is where the debate sharpens. The AP has faced pressure on transparency before. In 2024, voting details became public after backlash from within league circles. Russini herself had spoken about that moment earlier on the “Pardon My Take” podcast, where she admitted the reaction from people in football caught her off guard. She said, “I was out to dinner, and my phone was blowing up with people in football very angry that I voted for people that I voted for. That stunk. I wish I knew that because — it would not have changed my vote — but I love Josh Allen, and I am avoiding him for a really long time.”Meanwhile, Vrabel has continued his role with the Patriots without direct fallout. Reports suggest the franchise has taken a “business as usual” approach despite the noise around Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini's ongoing scandal.That contrast has only fueled the conversation. Russini steps away. Vrabel stays focused on football. And the AP remains silent. Until that changes, the debate around Mike Vrabel’s award will keep circling.
Article Summary: Mike Vrabel’s rise with the New England Patriots should have stayed a football story. Instead, it has turned into a wider debate. Questions around Dianna Russini and her role as an AP voter have now pulled his Coach of the Year honor into the spotlight.

Article Title: Why was Zachariah Branch arrested in Georgia just before the NFL Draft and what really happened in the sidewalk incident
Article Text:
Zachariah Branch arrested (Getty Images)

Why was Zachariah Branch arrested in Athens just days before the NFL Draft



The NFL draft process rarely slows down for anything, but over the weekend, Zachariah Branch found himself in an unexpected spotlight. The former Georgia receiver, widely viewed as a likely Day 2 selection, was arrested early Sunday morning in Athens on misdemeanor charges tied to obstruction. According to local records, the incident happened just hours after he attended Georgia’s spring game. He was booked shortly after 1 a.m. and released a little over two hours later after posting a $39 bond. Details remain limited as teams finalize draft boards.Police records indicate Branch is facing two misdemeanor charges, including obstruction of a law enforcement officer and blocking a public sidewalk. In a report obtained by NFL Network, an officer stated Branch failed "to comply with multiple verbal lawful commands" to clear the area. Beyond that, authorities have not shared much about what led to the interaction, leaving a gap between the allegation and the full context.The timing stands out. Branch had been in Athens the previous day for Georgia’s spring game, where his younger brother Zion, a defensive back, is part of the program. By early Sunday, the conversation had shifted from football to an off-field issue that now lingers as the draft approaches.For teams, the question is not just what happened, but how much it matters. Branch’s on-field profile is already well established. After transferring from USC, he delivered a strong 2025 season at Georgia, setting a program record with 81 receptions while adding 811 yards and six touchdowns. His speed also turned heads at the combine, where he clocked a 4.35-second 40-yard dash, placing him among the fastest receivers in this class.Evaluators have consistently placed him in the second-round range. Analysts across ESPN’s draft coverage have kept him inside the top 100 prospects, citing his explosiveness and production. Incidents like this, especially involving minor charges, do not always shift a player’s position dramatically. Still, teams tend to revisit background checks late in the process, looking for patterns rather than isolated moments.Right now, there is no clear indication that Branch’s draft outlook has changed. But with decisions being finalized, even a brief headline can prompt a second look.
Article Summary: Zachariah Branch was arrested early Sunday morning in Athens, Georgia. He was booked shortly after 1 a.m. and released a little over two hours later after posting a $39 bond. Branch is facing two misdemeanor charges, including obstruction of a law enforcement officer.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes And Brittany Mahomes: "I didn’t understand": Patrick Mahomes opens up about personal challenges while Brittany Mahomes embraces family traditions at home
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes opens up about personal challenges while Brittany Mahomes embraces family traditions at home( Getty)

Patrick Mahomes’ early NFL journey started with surprising struggle before gaining immense success

Brittany Mahomes shares a glimpse of family life while keeping Texas roots alive

A shocking admission about Patrick Mahomes ’ career is turning heads again. The Kansas City Chiefs star has built his reputation on jaw-dropping plays and big-game moments. However, a resurfaced comment has shifted focus to how his journey really started.At the same time, life away from football tells a different story. While Patrick Mahomes prepares for another demanding season, Brittany Mahomes continues to share grounded family moments. That contrast between pressure and peace makes this story stand out even more.The moment dates back to 2020, when Patrick Mahomes appeared on The Shop and made a candid admission about his development. In that segment, the star shed light on his early struggles. He said, “I didn’t understand how to read defences until like halfway through last year.”That one line recently went viral again after NFL analyst Dov Kleiman highlighted it, calling the situation “absolutely absurd” given Mahomes’ achievements at that point.He already won an MVP and a Super Bowl by 2020. So, this admission seems unreal. That rise did not happen overnight. After being drafted in 2017 by the Kansas City Chiefs, Mahomes sat behind veteran Alex Smith for a full season.That year became crucial. He studied film, adjusted to NFL speed, and learned head coach Andy Reid’s system. When he finally started in 2018, he exploded onto the scene with 5,000 passing yards and 50 touchdowns, joining Peyton Manning in an elite club.What makes his stance even more intriguing is what he added next during the same interview. The star-QB said he was “just playing” early in his career and reacting to what he saw rather than fully controlling the game. He also pointed out how players like Tom Brady read defences like a script, picking up small habits and patterns.Over time, that mental gap closed. As Mahomes gained experience, he improved at reading defenses before the snap and adjusting plays. That growth explains why he continues to stay ahead of defenders today. In simple terms, the league saw his talent first. Now, it is seeing his complete game. While Patrick Mahomes continues to shine in his NFL career, Brittany Mahomes is in the spotlight for a very different reason.While Patrick Mahomes handles the spotlight, Brittany Mahomes focuses on what happens at home, as well as her stunning career. On April 19, 2026, per Marca, she shared a simple but meaningful moment on Instagram. Her daughters, Sterling and Golden Raye, danced together to Choosin' Texas by Ella Langley. The clip showed them enjoying a lighthearted moment as they embraced their Texas roots through country music.That scene offers a clear contrast. On the one hand, Patrick Mahomes continues to evolve into a smarter quarterback for the Kansas City Chiefs. On the other hand, Brittany Mahomes ensures their home remains steady and rooted in tradition.Together, both sides justify the headline. His admission reveals the challenges behind his rise. Meanwhile, her role shows how balance and strong roots continue to shape the Mahomes family story.
Article Summary: Brittany Mahomes shares a glimpse of family life while keeping Texas roots alive. The Kansas City Chiefs star has built his reputation on jaw-dropping plays and big-game moments. However, a resurfaced comment has shifted focus to how his journey really started.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Garrett Wilson linked to unexpected Jets exit as draft speculation intensifies
Article Text:
Garrett Wilson trade rumors (Getty Images)

Are the Jets really considering moving Garrett Wilson despite their long-term plan



The New York Jets are not hiding where they stand. After a 2025 season that slipped out of reach early, the front office pivoted hard, moving cornerstone players and stacking draft capital for a longer play. The result is a roster in transition but rich with opportunity. With nine picks in the 2026 draft and three first-rounders already lined up for 2027, the Jets have given themselves flexibility few teams enjoy. The question now is not whether they can rebuild, but how aggressive they are willing to be along the way.The idea sounds counterintuitive at first. Garrett Wilson was extended just last summer, a clear signal he was meant to anchor the offense through this reset. Yet, as draft week approaches, his name has quietly entered league conversations. Not loudly, not urgently, but enough to raise eyebrows across front offices.Yahoo NFL insider Charles Robinson captured that uncertainty best, writing, “This one is flying a little under the radar given that the Jets do not appear to have interest in moving off Wilson right now,” before adding, “But there are a few teams that view Wilson among potential trade inquiries if the draft doesn’t break their way at wideout.And while it seems unlikely the new Jets regime would trade both Sauce Gardner and Wilson after signing them to extensions last offseason, I’d never say it’s impossible”.That last line matters. Impossible is not a word often used around this current Jets regime. They have already shown a willingness to make uncomfortable decisions if it serves the bigger picture. Still, moving Wilson would be a different kind of gamble. He is a proven producer when healthy, a three-time 1,000-yard receiver, and one of the few players on the roster who offers stability amid change.League sources expect “check-in” calls rather than serious negotiations. Teams that miss out on wide receivers early in the draft could circle back, especially given the lack of depth at the position this year. But interest alone does not create a deal. The Jets are not actively shopping Wilson, and his shortened 2025 season may complicate any attempt to extract peak value.There is also a football logic to keeping him. With Geno Smith expected to start in 2026 and a rookie quarterback likely arriving a year later, Wilson provides continuity. He is the kind of player who can ease a young passer into the league, someone who wins routes cleanly and demands defensive attention.For now, the more realistic path is patience. The Jets can use their draft capital to build around Wilson rather than cash him in. But the fact that his name is even part of the conversation says something about where this franchise is. Everything is on the table, even if some moves remain far less likely than others.
Article Summary: The New York Jets are not hiding where they stand. The Jets have nine picks in the 2026 draft and three first-rounders for 2027. The question now is not whether they can rebuild, but how aggressive they are willing to be along the way.

Article Title: Kay Adams predicted Dexter Lawrence trade a week ago, now fans are questioning how she saw it coming
Article Text:
Kay Adams (Getty Images)

Why are fans questioning Kay Adams after the Dexter Lawrence trade



Kay Adams found herself at the center of an unexpected online debate this weekend, not because of something she reported, but because of something she said days earlier. After the Dexter Lawrence trade to the Cincinnati Bengals was confirmed, fans quickly connected the move to Adams’ on-air suggestion from last week. The timing raised eyebrows. It also reopened a familiar debate about how information moves within NFL media circles and how quickly speculation can spiral beyond facts.The Bengals’ decision to part with a 2026 first-round pick to acquire Lawrence, followed by a one-year extension keeping him through 2028, was significant on its own. A three-time Pro Bowler with 102 starts, 341 tackles, and 30.5 sacks, Lawrence brings proven production to a defense that needed impact. But the conversation didn’t stay on football for long.Days before the deal, Kay Adams had floated the idea on her ‘Up & Adams’ show, even posting, “Hey Bengals… it’s time to make a BIG splash and trade for DT Dexter Lawrence.” When the move actually happened, social media did what it often does. It filled in gaps with assumption rather than evidence.“How did she know?” one user asked. Others went further, suggesting motives without proof.The tone escalated quickly, with some drawing comparisons to recent scrutiny involving Dianna Russini. The leap from coincidence to suspicion happened in hours, not days.There is, however, no indication Adams had prior knowledge of the trade. Around the league, suggestions like hers are common. Analysts often connect team needs with available talent. Sometimes they land close to reality. Most times they don’t. This time, it did.Still, the reaction says more about the current climate than about Adams herself. Conversations around access journalism, insider relationships, and media boundaries have become more charged. When one situation gains attention, it tends to pull others into its orbit, whether fairly or not.Adams’ name surfaced in that wider discussion, largely through opinion-driven commentary and social media chatter. There has been no formal allegation, no investigation, and no verified reporting tying her to any misconduct. Yet the noise persists.That tension between perception and proof continues to shape how sports media is consumed. In a space where access matters, even routine analysis can be viewed through a skeptical lens. And as this episode shows, once a narrative starts, it rarely stays contained.
Article Summary: Kay Adams had suggested a trade for Dexter Lawrence on her radio show. After the trade was confirmed, fans connected the move to Adams' on-air suggestion. There is, however, no indication Adams had prior knowledge of the trade. The reaction says more about the current climate than about Adams herself.

Article Title: Is Fernando Mendoza single? Expected No. 1 pick in the 2026 NFL Draft makes it clear
Article Text:
Fernando Mendoza (Getty Images)

What is Fernando Mendoza's relationship status



Fernando Mendoza is expected to hear his name first when the 2026 NFL Draft begins Thursday night in Pittsburgh. The former Indiana quarterback has been the projected No. 1 pick for months, and all signs now point to the Las Vegas Raiders making it official. What stands out is how little mystery remains. Mendoza has already spent time around the organization, working through installs and getting a feel for the system. For a player days away from his professional debut, the process has looked less like evaluation and more like early onboarding.Fernando Mendoza is currently single and fully focused on building his career. The clues are hard to ignore. Local coverage in Las Vegas has shifted tone in recent days, focusing less on speculation and more on readiness. “This feels kinda less like a formality and more like a preview of what’s to come,” said Alex Belcastro, a sports anchor at KSNV-TV News 3 in Las Vegas. “So take a good look at your quarterback. Reports say Fernando Mendoza has already started learning Klint Kubiak’s offense ahead of the draft. ”That level of access is unusual for a prospect who hasn’t been drafted yet. According to NFL Draft analyst Daniel Jeremiah, Mendoza’s preparation has gone beyond surface work.“Fernando Mendoza is working with Brian Griese right now, and it’s not so much that they’re working on footwork. They’re installing the Raiders’ offense. He’s full speed ahead.”It points to a level of certainty inside the Raiders’ building. Teams often guard their intentions closely at the top of the draft, but this situation feels different. Mendoza isn’t just being evaluated. He’s being prepared.Away from the field, Mendoza has kept his world deliberately small. He won’t attend the draft in person, choosing instead to spend the night in Florida with family and close friends. It fits the pattern he has followed throughout his rise. No distractions, no noise.“I only have LinkedIn and YouTube on my phone right now,” he told the media before the national championship game.“It’s really helped put things in perspective. I’m not online reading, ‘Fernando is great, Fernando stinks.’ I’m listening to what my quarterback coach says and what the quarterbacks in our room think.“That is what my focus is and that’s how I’ve been able to play my best football so far.”That approach has shaped both his performance and perception. Mendoza enters Thursday not just as the likely top pick, but as a player who already sounds and prepares like a pro. The only thing left now is the announcement.
Article Summary: Fernando Mendoza is expected to be picked first in the 2026 NFL Draft. The former Indiana quarterback has been the projected No. 1 pick for months. Reports say he has already started learning Klint Kubiak’s offense ahead of the draft.

Article Title: “Just return, baby": Aaron Rodgers hears honest take from Cameron Heyward as Steelers keeps waiting for his decision
Article Text:
Aaron Rodgers return talk (Getty Images)

Why is Cameron Heyward openly pushing for Aaron Rodgers to return

Watch “Just Return, Baby!” - Steelers DT Cam Heyward’s Message to Aaron Rodgers | The Rich Eisen Show “Just Return, Baby!” - Steelers DT Cam Heyward’s Message to Aaron Rodgers | The Rich Eisen Show

The Pittsburgh Steelers are once again in a holding pattern, and this time the wait feels more pointed. Veteran defensive lineman Cameron Heyward didn’t dodge the topic when asked about Aaron Rodgers . Instead, he leaned into it. Speaking on The Rich Eisen Show, Heyward made a direct appeal for the quarterback to return for the 2026 season, offering a tone that was far more inviting than his stance a year ago.Cameron Heyward’s message was simple, almost casual, but it carried weight inside a locker room that knows its window is not wide open forever.“He’s worn the black and gold,” Heyward said on NFL Network’s The Rich Eisen Show. “Just return, baby. That’s all we need.“I think he had a fun time being a part of this crew and we really enjoyed his company, but I’d like to be able to run it back with him.”There is context behind that shift. Just last offseason, Heyward took a harder line, saying, “I ain’t doing that darkness retreat. I don’t need any of that crap. Either you want to be a Pittsburgh Steeler or you don’t,” on his podcast. The contrast is hard to miss. The tone now is less about drawing a line and more about keeping a good thing going.Part of that change comes from what Rodgers delivered in 2025. At 42, he didn’t just manage games. He completed 65.7% of his passes for 3,322 yards with 24 touchdowns and seven interceptions, guiding Pittsburgh to a 10-6 record and its first AFC North title since 2020.For a team that has struggled in January, that kind of stability matters.Heyward made that clear when he told Eisen, “I think everybody is all in on him. From what we got to see this season, we were pleasantly surprised how great he was,” before adding that Rodgers was “a breath of fresh air” who “studies his a** off.”The urgency is not hard to read. Heyward turns 37 in May. Rodgers is already in his 40s. This is not about long-term planning. It is about squeezing another run out of a group that believes it is close but not quite there, especially with a 3-10 postseason record hanging over this era.The franchise is still waiting on Rodgers’ decision, despite earlier expectations from team president Art Rooney II that clarity would come before the draft. That timeline now feels optimistic.Other voices in the locker room, including Jaylen Warren, Patrick Queen and Michael Pittman Jr., have echoed support while keeping faith in the current quarterback room. Heyward, though, sounds less diplomatic. His message is clear. If there is a choice, the Steelers already know what they want.
Article Summary: Cameron Heyward made a direct appeal for Aaron Rodgers to return for the 2026 season. Heyward: “Just return, baby. That’s all we need.” The Steelers are still waiting on Rodgers’ decision, despite earlier expectations.

Article Title: Taylor Swift ‘on edge’ as Travis Kelce wedding leak turns dream celebration into security nightmare
Article Text:
Taylor Swift is reportedly “on edge” after her wedding date with Travis Kelce leaked, raising serious security concerns. The couple’s New York ceremony, already tightly planned, now faces intense scrutiny. Reports suggest advanced safety measures are being considered, while suspicion around internal leaks adds tension ahead of one of the most anticipated celebrity weddings.

Taylor Swift feels ‘on edge’ as Travis Kelce wedding leak triggers security fears

The spotlight has rarely felt this intense for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce . What should have been a tightly guarded celebration has turned into a growing concern after key wedding details surfaced online. Reports suggest the couple is now dealing with heightened anxiety as private plans continue to slip into the public domain, forcing them to rethink how they move forward in the final stretch before their big day.The issue goes beyond curiosity or fan excitement. It has reached a point where security discussions are no longer routine. Instead, they are being treated as a serious operational matter. With invitations already sent and a date tied to a symbolic summer holiday weekend in New York City, the leak has added pressure on a couple already navigating life under constant attention.According to reports, Swift has grown increasingly uneasy as more information becomes public. What was once described as carefully controlled planning has now taken a different tone. Behind closed doors, teams are said to be preparing for scenarios that go far beyond a standard celebrity event.Earlier, Swift had joyfully confirmed her engagement with a lighthearted caption, “Your English teacher and your gym teacher are getting married,” giving fans a rare glimpse into the couple’s playful dynamic.That moment now feels distant as the conversation shifts toward safety and control.People who work for the company say that the event is being planned very carefully. They are thinking about layers of protection, limited access points, and quick response plans. The amount of planning shows how real it is to host one of the most famous weddings in recent memory. What used to sound like praise for careful planning now sounds like a need.People are also getting more and more worried about where the leaks are coming from. Reports say that people are looking inward, and suspicions are growing about someone close to Kelce. That possibility makes an already complicated situation even more so, since trust becomes just as important as logistics.Even though things are hard, the couple keeps going. The date, which is just before Independence Day, has personal meaning for Swift and fits with her known love of timing that has meaning. The situation is still changing, though. Every new piece of information that comes out raises new questions about how private the party can really be.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding date leaked, raising security concerns. The couple's New York ceremony, already tightly planned, now faces intense scrutiny. Reports suggest advanced safety measures are being considered, while suspicion around internal leaks adds tension.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes’ wife Brittany Mahomes reveals jaw-dropping $60,000+ home upgrade in latest glimpse
Article Text:
Brittany Mahomes shared a glimpse of a stunning $60,000+ backyard upgrade at her home, drawing attention online. The stylish addition reflects the family’s focus on comfort and quality living. Alongside her home update, Brittany also recently celebrated a personal milestone with her Hall of Fame honor, with Patrick Mahomes showing support through a heartfelt message.

Brittany Mahomes drops glimpse of eye-catching $60,000+ home upgrade

Brittany Mahomes gave fans a glimpse into her family life this weekend, and it quickly caught attention for one reason. The Mahomes backyard just got a major upgrade. In a short Instagram Story clip, Brittany revealed a brand new playhouse setup designed for her three young children. Right away, the structure stood out. It looked less like a simple playset and more like a small vacation spot made just for kids.The timing made the moment feel even more special. With Patrick Mahomes getting ready for another tough NFL season, it seems like the focus at home is on making their growing family happy and comfortable. Brittany’s post was simple, but it spoke volumes about how the couple balances a high-profile career with everyday parenting.The playhouse itself is far from ordinary. The setup features two white structures connected by stairs, complete with bold red slides that instantly grab attention. Beneath it sits a shaded seating area with a table and chairs, offering a cool space for the kids to relax. Brittany summed up the excitement in her caption, writing, "@kingswingsplay upgrade!!!!!," keeping it short but full of energy.The design matches a high-end model known as the Everwilde Playhouse, which carries a price tag of over $60,000.It blends style with function, giving the children a safe place to play while also fitting seamlessly into a modern backyard. For a family constantly in the public eye, it feels like a thoughtful investment in normal, happy moments.Brittany and Patrick share three children: daughter Sterling, son Bronze, and their youngest, Golden. Each addition to their home seems to reflect their focus on creating lasting memories rather than just luxury for the sake of it.This is not the first time Brittany has shared personal milestones with fans. Earlier this year, she celebrated a major achievement of her own when she was inducted into the UT Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame. Reflecting on the honor, she wrote, "Truly honored to be inducted into the UT Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame! This City and this School is a huge part of who I am today, I will forever cherish this honor and am forever grateful for what this program did for me as an athlete and as a person! Coach Webb, you brought out the best in me, this doesn’t happen without you!"Patrick Mahomes kept his reaction simple but meaningful, commenting, "Congrats!!!! Love you!"Whether it is celebrating achievements or building a backyard playground, the Mahomes family continues to share small pieces of a life that blends fame with genuine family moments.
Article Summary: Brittany Mahomes shared a glimpse of a $60,000+ backyard upgrade at her home. The stylish addition reflects the family’s focus on comfort and quality living. Alongside her home update, Brittany also recently celebrated a personal milestone with her Hall of Fame honor.
